files.text:
module Acme.Auth (authenticate) where

authenticate :: Credentials -> Session
authenticate c
  | not (verify c) = error "invalid credentials"
  | otherwise      = newSession c

module Acme.Auth (authenticate, AuthError (..)) where

import Control.Exception (Exception, throwIO)

data AuthError = InvalidCredentials
  deriving (Show)

instance Exception AuthError

authenticate :: Credentials -> IO Session
authenticate c
  | not (verify c) = throwIO InvalidCredentials
  | otherwise      = pure (newSession c)
